name: Llwyn-on Reservoir Forest Trail
highlights: Garwnant Centre gateway to Llwyn-on — oak woodland and dam views above the Taff.
points_of_interest: Garwnant Forest Centre; Llwyn-on Reservoir dam; Neuadd–Llwyn-on aqueduct
viewpoints: Dam top panorama; wood-framed Pen y Fan glimpse
food_drink_nearby: Garwnant café (seasonal); The Red Lion Merthyr
hazards_notes: Forest harvesting may divert paths; watch for cyclists
